headline: Week in Review: Stable signal environment. 53 critical flags persistent. 268 days to FCC cliff.

predictions.event: 74% of pending COW applications stalled — incomplete submissions, 7 common errors documented
predictions.hedge: Guided application tools (like DroneClear Document Builder) will have significantly higher first-submission rates.
